attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT SNLTD.BATCH_ID, SNLTD.TRANSACTION_ID, SNLTD.PROFILE_ID, SNLTD.ORG_ID, SNLTD.LINE_ID, SNLTD.OPERATING_UNIT, SNLTD.ELEMENT_TYPE,
SNLTD.RC_ID, SNLTD.SRC_ID, SNLTD.RAE_ADJ_ID, SNLTD.RAE_CALL_TYPE, SNLTD.RC_TYPE, SNLTD.RAE_ACCR_POSTED, SNLTD.RAE_RELEASE_POSTED,
SNLTD.NET_ACCR_RAE_POSTED, SNLTD.COMMENTS, SNLTD.RAE_POSTED_DATE, SNLTD.ERROR_FLAG, SNLTD.ERROR_MESSAGE, SNLTD.CR_SEGMENT1,
SNLTD.CR_SEGMENT2, SNLTD.CR_SEGMENT3, SNLTD.CR_SEGMENT4, SNLTD.CR_SEGMENT5, SNLTD.CR_SEGMENT6, SNLTD.DB_SEGMENT1, SNLTD.DB_SEGMENT2,
SNLTD.DB_SEGMENT3, SNLTD.DB_SEGMENT4, SNLTD.DB_SEGMENT5, SNLTD.DB_SEGMENT6, SNLTD.ENTERED_CURRENCY, SNLTD.EXCHANGE_RATE,
SNLTD.EXCHANGE_DATE, SNLTD.ADJ_SOURCE, SNLTD.AUTO_EXECUTE_FLAG, SNLTD.ADJ_DESCRIPTION, SNLTD.ASSOCIATE_TYPE, SNLTD.EXECUTION_EVENT_TYPE,
SNLTD.DOWNSTREAM_DIRECTION, SNLTD.ADJ_START_DATE, SNLTD.GL_BATCH_ID, SNLTD.GL_POSTED_DATE, SNLTD.GL_POSTED_AMT, SNLTD.GL_IFACED_AMT,
SNLTD.FUNC_CURRENCY, SNLTD.ADJ_STATUS, SNLTD.ERROR_MSG, SNLTD.ACTION_TYPE, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE_CAT, SNLTD.GL_POSTED_FLAG, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE1,
SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE2, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE3, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE4, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE5, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE6, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE7, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE8,
SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE9, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE10, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE11, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE12, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE13, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE14, SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE15,
SNLTD.CREATE_BY, SNLTD.CREATION_DATE, SNLTD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SNLTD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SNLTD.GL_IFACED_DATE, SNLTD.START_PERIOD,
SNLTD.FISCAL_PERIOD, SNLTD.RC_NAME, SNLTD.SRC_NAME,SNLTD.SOURCE_KEY, SNLTD.ACCRUAL_POSTED, SNLTD.ACCRUAL_UNPOSTED, SNLTD.TOTAL_ACCRUAL,
SNLTD.ACCRUAL_COMMENT, SNLTD.RELEASE_POSTED, SNLTD.RELEASE_UNPOSTED, SNLTD.TOTAL_RELEASE, SNLTD.RELEASE_COMMENT,
SNLTD.NET_ACCRUAL_POSTED, SNLTD.NET_ACCRUAL_UNPOSTED, SNLTD.NET_ACCRUAL, SNLTD.CREATE_DATETIME, SNLTD.ACTION_CODE , 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS SNLTD
WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM 
$$WORKDB.W_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT WCMA WHERE 
 WCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SNLTD.TRANSACTION_ID)

SELECT	
'C' 					AS 	BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,
SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY         AS             CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNLTD.PROFILE_ID				AS 	BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT,
SNLTD.ELEMENT_TYPE				AS 	BK_CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD, 
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD    	AS 	BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT                 AS  	BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD     	                AS 	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT  	AS 	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT,
'UNK'  						AS 	BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_SUMMARY_CD,
SNLTD.GL_POSTED_FLAG			       			AS	GL_ELIGIBLE_FLG,				               
cast('LOSS PROVISION' as varchar(15)) 				AS  	ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
SNLTD.TRANSACTION_ID 			AS 	SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNLTD.CREATION_DATE,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE))		AS 	RU_SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,		        
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))		AS	RU_DEFERRAL_USD_AMT,           
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))		AS	RU_DEFERRAL_REL_USD_AMT,     
SNLTD.RAE_ACCR_POSTED 			AS	RU_ACCURAL_USD_AMT,            
SNLTD.RAE_RELEASE_POSTED		AS	RU_ACCURAL_REL_USD_AMT,       
'N'						AS	RU_PROVISION_CHANNEL_FLG,      
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))				AS	RU_PROVISION_USD_AMT,          
(
CASE	WHEN SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN SNLTD.CREATION_DATE 
ELSE	CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) 
END	) AS 	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(
CASE	WHEN SNLTD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' 
ELSE	USER 
END	)							AS	 EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)						AS	 EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER								AS    	 EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,-999) AS  RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNLTD.ACTION_CODE 						AS	 ACTION_CODE, 
'I' 								AS	 DML_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS SNLTD
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR 
	ON	(SNLTD.RC_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR 
	ON	(SNLTD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SCMA
        ON      (SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SNLTD.TRANSACTION_ID AND SCMA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'LOSS PROVISION' )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
  ON  SNLTD.ORG_ID =EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT     
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
ON (SNLTD.RAE_ADJ_ID  = NRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
    AND EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE=NRA.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD)
UNION ALL
SELECT
SNMATD.ELEMENT_TYPE			AS 	       BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,
SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY         AS             CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNMATD.PROFILE_ID			AS	       BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNMATD.LINE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')  	AS	       BK_CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD  ,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD 	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD		AS	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT  	AS	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT,
SNMATD.ACC_RULE 			AS		BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_SUMMARY_CD,
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.GL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE SNMATD.GL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG END)	AS	GL_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
cast('DEFERRAL' as varchar(15))		AS		ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
SNMATD.TRANSACTION_ID			AS		SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNMATD.CREATION_DATE,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE))  AS	RU_SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
CAST( TSS_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))  	AS 		RU_DEFERRAL_USD_AMT,             
CAST( TSS_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))	AS 		RU_DEFERRAL_REL_USD_AMT,  
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))		AS 		RU_ACCURAL_USD_AMT,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))	 	AS 		RU_ACCURAL_REL_USD_AMT,
'N' 					AS		RU_PROVISION_CHANNEL_FLG  ,    
COALESCE(SNMATD.RAE_REL_AMT,0)		AS		RU_PROVISION_USD_AMT,          
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN SNMATD.CREATION_DATE ELSE CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END) AS 	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' ELSE USER END) 			AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 											AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER 													AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,-999)  									AS  RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNMATD.ACTION_CODE 											AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' 													AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS SNMATD
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR ON (SNMATD.RC_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR ON (SNMATD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SCMA
        ON      (SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SNMATD.TRANSACTION_ID AND SCMA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'DEFERRAL')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
  ON  SNMATD.ORG_ID =EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT     
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
ON ( SNMATD.RAE_ADJ_ID  = NRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
     AND NRA.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD=EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE ) 
UNION ALL
  
SELECT
'B'					AS 	       BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,
SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY         AS             CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNMBTD.PROFILE_ID			AS	       BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT,
'UNKNOWN'	  			AS	       BK_CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD  ,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD 	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD		AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT  	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT,
SNMBTD.ACC_RULE 			AS	       BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_SUMMARY_CD,
'Y'					AS		GL_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
cast('DEFERRAL' as varchar(15))		AS		ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
SNMBTD.TRANSACTION_ID			AS		SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNMBTD.CREATION_DATE,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE))  AS	RU_SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
(  	CAST(SNMBTD.PROD_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
        CAST(SNMBTD.PROD_SUB_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
        CAST(SNMBTD.TSS_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
        CAST(SNMBTD.ASS_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
        CAST(SNMBTD.AST_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
        CAST(SNMBTD.OTH_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ) 	AS RU_DEFERRAL_USD_AMT,           
(
      CAST(SNMBTD.PROD_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
      CAST(SNMBTD.PROD_SUB_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
      CAST(SNMBTD.TSS_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
      CAST(SNMBTD.ASS_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
      CAST(SNMBTD.AST_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
      CAST(SNMBTD.OTH_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7) ))	AS 	RU_DEFERRAL_REL_USD_AMT,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))						AS 		RU_ACCURAL_USD_AMT,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))	 					AS 		RU_ACCURAL_REL_USD_AMT,
'N' 									AS		RU_PROVISION_CHANNEL_FLG  ,    
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))						AS		RU_PROVISION_USD_AMT,          
(CASE WHEN SNMBTD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN SNMBTD.CREATION_DATE ELSE CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END) AS 	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(CASE WHEN SNMBTD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' ELSE USER END) 		AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 									AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER 											AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CAST(0 AS INTEGER)							                AS  RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNMBTD.ACTION_CODE 									AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' 											AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_MA_BOOK_TRX_DETAILS SNMBTD
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR ON (SNMBTD.RC_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR ON (SNMBTD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
INNER  JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SCMA
        ON      (SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SNMBTD.TRANSACTION_ID AND SCMA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'DEFERRAL')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
  ON  SNMBTD.ORG_ID =EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT     
        
UNION ALL
SELECT
SNMATD.ELEMENT_TYPE			AS 	       BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,
SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY         AS             CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNMATD.PROFILE_ID			AS	       BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNMATD.LINE_TYPE,0)  			AS	       BK_CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD  ,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD 	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD		AS	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT  	AS	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT,
SNMATD.ACC_RULE 			AS		BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_SUMMARY_CD,
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.GL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE SNMATD.GL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG END)	AS	GL_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
cast('PROVISION' as varchar(15))				AS		ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
SNMATD.TRANSACTION_ID			AS		SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNMATD.CREATION_DATE,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE))  AS	RU_SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))	 				AS	RU_DEFERRAL_USD_AMT,           
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))		 				AS 	RU_DEFERRAL_REL_USD_AMT, 
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))						AS 	RU_ACCURAL_USD_AMT,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))						AS 	RU_ACCURAL_REL_USD_AMT,
ENML.PROV_CHANNEL_FLAG             			AS		RU_PROVISION_CHANNEL_FLG  ,    
COALESCE(SNMATD.RAE_REL_AMT,0)			AS		RU_PROVISION_USD_AMT,          
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN SNMATD.CREATION_DATE ELSE CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END) AS 	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' ELSE USER END) 			AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 											AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER 													AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,-999)   AS  RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNMATD.ACTION_CODE 											AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' 													AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS SNMATD
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR ON (SNMATD.RC_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR ON (SNMATD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_MA_LINES ENML ON (SNMATD.LINE_ID = ENML.MA_LINE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SCMA
        ON      (SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SNMATD.TRANSACTION_ID AND SCMA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'PROVISION')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
  ON  SNMATD.ORG_ID =EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT     
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
ON ( SNMATD.RAE_ADJ_ID  = NRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
     AND NRA.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD=EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE          )
UNION ALL
SELECT
ENMATD.ELEMENT_TYPE			AS 	       BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,
SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY         AS             CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
ENMATD.PROFILE_ID			AS	       BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT,
ENMATD.LINE_TYPE  			AS	       BK_CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD  ,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD 	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD		AS	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT  	AS	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT,
ENMATD.ACC_RULE 			AS		BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_SUMMARY_CD,
(CASE WHEN ENMATD.GL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE ENMATD.GL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG END)	AS	GL_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
cast('PROVISION' as varchar(15))				AS		ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
ENMATD.TRANSACTION_ID			AS		SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(ENMATD.CREATION_DATE,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE))  AS	RU_SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))	  				AS	RU_DEFERRAL_USD_AMT,           
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))		 				AS 	RU_DEFERRAL_REL_USD_AMT, 
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))	 					AS 	RU_ACCURAL_USD_AMT,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))	 					AS 	RU_ACCURAL_REL_USD_AMT,
ENML.PROV_CHANNEL_FLAG             			AS		RU_PROVISION_CHANNEL_FLG  ,    
COALESCE(ENMATD.RAE_REL_AMT,0)			AS		RU_PROVISION_USD_AMT,          
(CASE WHEN ENMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN ENMATD.CREATION_DATE ELSE CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END) AS 	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(CASE WHEN ENMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' ELSE USER END) 			AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 											AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER 													AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,-999)   AS  RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
ENMATD.ACTION_CODE 											AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' 													AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS ENMATD
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR ON (ENMATD.RC_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR ON (ENMATD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_MA_LINES ENML ON (ENMATD.LINE_ID = ENML.MA_LINE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SCMA
        ON      (SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = ENMATD.TRANSACTION_ID AND SCMA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'PROVISION')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
  ON  ENMATD.ORG_ID =EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT     
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
ON ( ENMATD.RAE_ADJ_ID  = NRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
     AND NRA.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD=EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE  ) 
UNION ALL
SELECT
SNMATD.ELEMENT_TYPE			AS 	       BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,
SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY         AS             CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNMATD.PROFILE_ID			AS	       BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNMATD.LINE_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')  			AS	       BK_CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD  ,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD 	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD		AS	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT  	AS	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT,
SNMATD.ACC_RULE 			AS		BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_SUMMARY_CD,
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.GL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE SNMATD.GL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG END)	AS	GL_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
cast('DEFERRAL' as varchar(15))				AS		ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
SNMATD.TRANSACTION_ID			AS		SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNMATD.CREATION_DATE,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE))  AS	RU_SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
CAST( TSS_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))  		 	 AS RU_DEFERRAL_USD_AMT,             
CAST( TSS_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))				 	AS 	RU_DEFERRAL_REL_USD_AMT,  
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))		AS 		RU_ACCURAL_USD_AMT,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))	 	AS 		RU_ACCURAL_REL_USD_AMT,
'N' 					AS		RU_PROVISION_CHANNEL_FLG  ,    
COALESCE(SNMATD.RAE_REL_AMT,0)		AS		RU_PROVISION_USD_AMT,          
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN SNMATD.CREATION_DATE ELSE CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END) AS 	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(CASE WHEN SNMATD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' ELSE USER END) 			AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 											AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER 													AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,-999)  AS  RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNMATD.ACTION_CODE 											AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' 													AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS SNMATD
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR ON (SNMATD.RC_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR ON (SNMATD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SCMA
        ON      (SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SNMATD.TRANSACTION_ID AND SCMA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'DEFERRAL')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
  ON  SNMATD.ORG_ID =EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT     
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
ON ( SNMATD.RAE_ADJ_ID  = NRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
     AND NRA.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD=EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE ) 
UNION ALL
  
SELECT
'B'					AS 	       BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,
SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY         AS             CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNMBTD.PROFILE_ID			AS	       BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT,
'UNKNOWN'	  			AS	       BK_CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD  ,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD 	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD		AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT  	AS	       BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT,
SNMBTD.ACC_RULE 			AS	       BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_SUMMARY_CD,
'Y'					AS		GL_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
cast('DEFERRAL' as varchar(15))		AS		ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
SNMBTD.TRANSACTION_ID			AS		SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SNMBTD.CREATION_DATE,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE))  AS	RU_SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
(  	CAST(SNMBTD.PROD_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
        CAST(SNMBTD.PROD_SUB_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
        CAST(SNMBTD.TSS_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
        CAST(SNMBTD.ASS_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
        CAST(SNMBTD.AST_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
        CAST(SNMBTD.OTH_HOLD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) ) 	AS RU_DEFERRAL_USD_AMT,           
(
      CAST(SNMBTD.PROD_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
      CAST(SNMBTD.PROD_SUB_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
      CAST(SNMBTD.TSS_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
      CAST(SNMBTD.ASS_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
      CAST(SNMBTD.AST_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))+
      CAST(SNMBTD.OTH_REL_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7) ))	AS 	RU_DEFERRAL_REL_USD_AMT,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))						AS 		RU_ACCURAL_USD_AMT,
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))	 					AS 		RU_ACCURAL_REL_USD_AMT,
'N' 									AS		RU_PROVISION_CHANNEL_FLG  ,    
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))						AS		RU_PROVISION_USD_AMT,          
(CASE WHEN SNMBTD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN SNMBTD.CREATION_DATE ELSE CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END) AS 	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(CASE WHEN SNMBTD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' ELSE USER END) 		AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 									AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER 											AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CAST(0 AS INTEGER)							                AS  RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SNMBTD.ACTION_CODE 									AS ACTION_CODE, 
'I' 											AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_NGCCRM_MA_BOOK_TRX_DETAILS SNMBTD
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR ON (SNMBTD.RC_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR ON (SNMBTD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
INNER  JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SCMA
        ON      (SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SNMBTD.TRANSACTION_ID AND SCMA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'DEFERRAL')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
  ON  SNMBTD.ORG_ID =EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT        
  UNION ALL
SELECT	
'C' 					AS 	BK_ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,
SCMA.CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY         AS             CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
ENLTD.PROFILE_ID				AS 	BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT,
ENLTD.ELEMENT_TYPE				AS 	BK_CCRM_ELEMENT_TYPE_CD, 
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD    	AS 	BK_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,
NAR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT                 AS  	BK_CCRM_ADJ_REASON_VER_NUM_INT,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD     	                AS 	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBREASON_CD,
NASR.BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT  	AS 	BK_CCRM_ADJ_SUBRSN_VER_NUM_INT,
'UNK'  						AS 	BK_ACCOUNTING_SCOPE_SUMMARY_CD,
ENLTD.GL_POSTED_FLAG			       			AS	GL_ELIGIBLE_FLG,				               
cast('LOSS PROVISION' as varchar(15)) 				AS  	ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
ENLTD.TRANSACTION_ID 			AS 	SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(ENLTD.CREATION_DATE,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE))		AS 	RU_SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,		        
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))		AS	RU_DEFERRAL_USD_AMT,           
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))		AS	RU_DEFERRAL_REL_USD_AMT,     
ENLTD.RAE_ACCR_POSTED 			AS	RU_ACCURAL_USD_AMT,            
ENLTD.RAE_RELEASE_POSTED		AS	RU_ACCURAL_REL_USD_AMT,       
'N'						AS	RU_PROVISION_CHANNEL_FLG,      
CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))				AS	RU_PROVISION_USD_AMT,          
(
CASE	WHEN ENLTD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN ENLTD.CREATION_DATE 
ELSE	CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) 
END	) AS 	EDW_CREATE_DTM,
(
CASE	WHEN ENLTD.ATTRIBUTE11='Y' THEN 'E_MIGRATION_BATCH' 
ELSE	USER 
END	)							AS	 EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)						AS	 EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER								AS    	 EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,-999) AS  RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
ENLTD.ACTION_CODE 						AS	 ACTION_CODE, 
'I' 								AS	 DML_TYPE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS ENLTD
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_REASON NAR 
	ON	(ENLTD.RC_ID = NAR.SK_REASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CCRM_ADJUSTMENT_SUBREASON NASR 
	ON	(ENLTD.SRC_ID = NASR.SK_SUBREASON_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SCMA
        ON      (SCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = ENLTD.TRANSACTION_ID AND SCMA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = 'LOSS PROVISION' )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
  ON  ENLTD.ORG_ID =EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT     
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
ON (ENLTD.RAE_ADJ_ID  = NRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
    AND EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE=NRA.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD)

SELECT SNMTD.BATCH_ID, SNMTD.TRANSACTION_ID, SNMTD.ORG_ID, SNMTD.OPERATING_UNIT, SNMTD.PROFILE_ID, SNMTD.ACC_RULE, SNMTD.HDR_ID,
SNMTD.LINE_ID, SNMTD.LINE_TYPE, SNMTD.ELEMENT_TYPE, SNMTD.RC_ID, SNMTD.SRC_ID, SNMTD.RAE_ADJ_ID, SNMTD.RC_TYPE, SNMTD.RAE_DEF_AMT,
SNMTD.RAE_REL_AMT, SNMTD.NET_DEF_RAE_POSTED, SNMTD.COMMENTS, SNMTD.PROD_HOLD_AMT, SNMTD.TSS_HOLD_AMT, SNMTD.ASS_HOLD_AMT,
SNMTD.AST_HOLD_AMT, SNMTD.OTH_HOLD_AMT, SNMTD.HOLD_COMMENTS, SNMTD.PROD_REL_AMT, SNMTD.TSS_REL_AMT, SNMTD.ASS_REL_AMT,
SNMTD.AST_REL_AMT, SNMTD.OTH_REL_AMT, SNMTD.REL_BOOKING_COMMENTS, SNMTD.PROD_NET_AMT, SNMTD.TSS_NET_AMT, SNMTD.ASS_NET_AMT,
SNMTD.AST_NET_AMT, SNMTD.OTH_NET_AMT, SNMTD.CREATE_BY, SNMTD.CREATION_DATE, SNMTD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SNMTD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SNMTD.RAE_POSTED_DATE, SNMTD.ERROR_FLAG, SNMTD.CR_SEGMENT1, SNMTD.CR_SEGMENT2, SNMTD.CR_SEGMENT3, SNMTD.CR_SEGMENT4, SNMTD.CR_SEGMENT5,
SNMTD.CR_SEGMENT6, SNMTD.DB_SEGMENT1, SNMTD.DB_SEGMENT2, SNMTD.DB_SEGMENT3, SNMTD.DB_SEGMENT4, SNMTD.DB_SEGMENT5, SNMTD.DB_SEGMENT6,
SNMTD.ENTERED_CURRENCY, SNMTD.EXCHANGE_RATE, SNMTD.EXCHANGE_DATE, SNMTD.ADJ_SOURCE, SNMTD.AUTO_EXECUTE_FLAG, SNMTD.ADJ_DESCRIPTION,
SNMTD.ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE, SNMTD.ASSOCIATE_TYPE, SNMTD.EXECUTION_EVENT_TYPE, SNMTD.DOWNSTREAM_DIRECTION, SNMTD.ADJ_START_DATE,
SNMTD.GL_BATCH_ID, SNMTD.GL_POSTED_DATE, SNMTD.GL_POSTED_AMT, SNMTD.GL_IFACED_AMT, SNMTD.FUNC_CURRENCY, SNMTD.ADJ_STATUS,
SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE_CAT, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE1, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE2, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE3, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE4, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE5, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE6,
SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE7, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE8, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE9, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE10, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE11, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE12, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE13,
SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE14, SNMTD.ATTRIBUTE15, SNMTD.ACTION_TYPE, SNMTD.GL_POSTED_FLAG, SNMTD.GL_IFACED_DATE, SNMTD.START_PERIOD,
SNMTD.FISCAL_PERIOD, SNMTD.USAGE_RECLASS_AMT, SNMTD.PROV_REL_TYPE, SNMTD.RC_NAME, SNMTD.SRC_NAME, SNMTD.SOURCE_KEY,SNMTD.ERROR_MESSAGE,
SNMTD.RAE_CALL_TYPE, SNMTD.DEF_POSTED, SNMTD.DEF_UNPOSTED, SNMTD.TOTAL_DEF, SNMTD.DEF_COMMENT, SNMTD.REL_POSTED, SNMTD.REL_UNPOSTED,
SNMTD.TOTAL_REL, SNMTD.RELEASE_COMMENT, SNMTD.NET_DEF_POSTED, SNMTD.NET_DEF_UNPOSTED, SNMTD.NET_DEF, SNMTD.PROV_POSTED,
SNMTD.PROV_UNPOSTED, SNMTD.NET_PROV, SNMTD.PROV_COMMENT, SNMTD.PROV_CHANNEL_FLAG, SNMTD.PROV_REL_POSTED, SNMTD.PROV_REL_UNPOSTED,
SNMTD.NET_PROV_REL, SNMTD.PROV_REL_COMMENT, SNMTD.PROV_REL_CHANNEL_FLAG, SNMTD.NET_PRO_POSTED, SNMTD.NET_PRO_UNPOSTED, SNMTD.NET_PRO,
SNMTD.TOT_NET_DEF_PRO_POSTED, SNMTD.TOT_NET_DEF_PRO_UNPOSTED, SNMTD.TOT_NET_DEF_PRO, SNMTD.GL_ELIGIBLE_FLAG, SNMTD.PROD_SUB_HOLD_AMT,
SNMTD.PROD_SUB_REL_AMT, SNMTD.PROD_SUB_NET_AMT, SNMTD.CREATE_DATETIME, SNMTD.ACTION_CODE, 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS SNMTD
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1
FROM 
$$WORKDB.W_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT WCMA WHERE
 WCMA.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SNMTD.TRANSACTION_ID)

SELECT
(RANK() OVER(
ORDER BY  A.TRANSACTION_ID||A.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE) + CCRMKEY.MAX_VAL) CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
A.TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
A.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
 FROM 
(
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ),0) MAX_VAL
 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT CCRM
) CCRMKEY,
(
SELECT SNMATD.TRANSACTION_ID AS TRANSACTION_ID,
cast ('DEFERRAL'  as varchar(15)) AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
 FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS SNMATD WHERE RC_TYPE='Deferral'
UNION ALL
SELECT SNMBTD.TRANSACTION_ID AS TRANSACTION_ID,
cast ('DEFERRAL'  as varchar(15)) AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
 FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_MA_BOOK_TRX_DETAILS SNMBTD WHERE RC_TYPE='Deferral'
UNION ALL
SELECT SNMATD.TRANSACTION_ID AS TRANSACTION_ID,
cast('PROVISION' as varchar(15)) 	 AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
 FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS SNMATD
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_MA_LINES ENML ON (SNMATD.LINE_ID = ENML.MA_LINE_ID) AND ENML .RC_TYPE = 'Provision'
UNION ALL
SELECT  SNLTD.TRANSACTION_ID,
cast ('LOSS PROVISION'  as varchar(15))   AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE 
 FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_LP_TRX_DETAILS SNLTD
UNION ALL
SELECT ENMATD.TRANSACTION_ID AS TRANSACTION_ID,
cast ('DEFERRAL'  as varchar(15)) AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
 FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS ENMATD
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_MA_BOOK_TRX_DETAILS ENMBTD ON (ENMBTD.TRANSACTION_ID = ENMATD.TRANSACTION_ID)
UNION ALL
SELECT ENMATD.TRANSACTION_ID AS TRANSACTION_ID,
cast('PROVISION' as varchar(15)) 	 AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
 FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_NGCCRM_MA_TRX_DETAILS ENMATD
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_NGCCRM_MA_LINES ENML ON (ENMATD.LINE_ID = ENML.MA_LINE_ID) AND ENML .RC_TYPE = 'Provision'
) A
WHERE  NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM  $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_CCRM_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT SMCRM
 WHERE SMCRM.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=A.TRANSACTION_ID AND  SMCRM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE = A.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE)
